ftp:config.name: employee-api-ftp-config
ftp:config.doc:name: FTP Config
ftp:config.doc:description: FTP connection configuration for reading and writing employee data files

configuration.doc:name: Default Error Handler Configuration
configuration.doc:description: Sets employee-api-global-error-handler as the default error handler for all flows in the application

configuration-properties.doc:name: Configuration Properties
configuration-properties.doc:description: Loads application properties for HTTP listener and FTP connector from config.yaml

http:listener-config.name: employee-api-http-listener-config
http:listener-config.doc:name: HTTP Listener Config
http:listener-config.doc:description: HTTP listener configuration binding to ${http.host}:${http.port} for the Employee Details API

apikit:config.name: employee-details-api-config
apikit:config.doc:name: APIKit Config
apikit:config.doc:description: APIKit router configuration bound to the Employee Details API RAML specification v1.0.1
